name: @hachej/boring-github-pr-tracker
description: GitHub PR Tracker plugin for Boring workspace.

pi.systemPrompt: GitHub PR Tracker plugin. Use refresh_github_pr_tracker for PR/issue board data. Use label_github_pr for PR labels and label_github_issue for issue labels/classification. Use bclaw:ready for issues ready for boring-claw/bead workflow.

scripts.build: esbuild front/index.tsx --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --outfile=dist/front/index.js --external:react --external:react-dom --external:@hachej/boring-workspace/plugin && esbuild server/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/server/index.js --external:@hachej/boring-workspace/server && esbuild agent/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/agent/index.js
